# Total execution gas of this compiler's bytecode vs solc's for solidity-gas.
# Generated by scripts/UpdateCorpusGas.lean; re-pin with scripts/update-gas.sh.
# Pinned to solc 0.8.35, EVM version osaka. 'ours' is a ceiling:
# CI fails if this compiler's total rises above it while solc's is unchanged.
# columns: fixture<TAB>ours<TAB>solc
abiv2.sol	26765	6886
abiv2_optimised.sol	26765	6886
data_storage.sol	916	202
dispatch_large.sol	112779	76647
dispatch_large_optimised.sol	112779	76647
dispatch_medium.sol	52552	41541
dispatch_medium_optimised.sol	52552	41541
dispatch_small.sol	31601	29028
dispatch_small_optimised.sol	31601	29028
exp.sol	4000	776
exp_optimized.sol	4000	776
